headline: Lam Research (LRCX) Is Up 6.1% After AI-Fueled Beat And Raised Chip-Equipment Outlook
summary: In recent weeks, Lam Research reported quarterly revenue growth of 24% year over year with earnings surpassing guidance, raised its outlook for wafer fabrication equipment demand, and highlighted strong AI-driven orders alongside growing U.S. onshore manufacturing partnerships. At the same time, institutional investors have been accumulating shares even as some insiders sell and valuation concerns and China export risks temper the otherwise upbeat AI and semiconductor equipment...
